comment.body:
okay, so... 
the european unio will put pressure on US, mostly during london session... naturally. Bonds and tech stocks. Mostly tech.
Nobody is happy with the current developments. 
Naturally, Blackrock, JP Morgan and some middle eastern souvereign funds will do their best to support Trump's goals with the markets. Weak dollar and supported market. 
This is a left-tail, but kurtosis is what they are about to manage. 
Kurtosis is tailedness. 
For the simplicity now, take is as they manage how deep the volatility could push the spot.
So as I wrote yesterday, until the union doesn't step out of the check, this seemingly zugzwang situation, the pressure will remain.

comment.body:
if the vvol is higher, vol changes faster, that means the returns are wider = the velocity of spot is accelerating faster.
if vol is the velocity of price changes, then vvol is the acceleration of velocity. 
so in case of higher vvol, the spot finds itself faster and with higher probability in the tails.
